creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
fribidi is a default on option in mplayer since April 27, see
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/multimedia/mplayer/Makefile?r1=351544&r2=352424

Is your ports tree up-to-date? If you had changed build options
manually before (and disabled fribidi), you may want to check them
again.

Best
Riggs
